children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Gross income of an employee does not include amounts paid by the employer as a contribution to the Trump account of such employee or of any dependent of such employee if the amounts are paid or incurred pursuant to a program which is described in subsection (c).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The amount which may be excluded under subsection (a) with respect to any employee shall not exceed $2,500.

children.label: ii
children.text: the cost-of-living adjustment determined under section 1(f)(3) for the calendar year in which the taxable year begins by substituting “calendar year 2026” for “calendar year 2016” in subparagraph (A)(ii) thereof.

children.heading: Rounding
children.label: B Rounding
children.text: If any increase determined under subparagraph (A) is not a multiple of $100, such increase shall be rounded to the next lowest multiple of $100.

children.heading: Trump account contribution program
children.label: c Trump account contribution program
children.text: For purposes of this section, a Trump account contribution program is a separate written plan of an employer for the exclusive benefit of his employees to provide contributions to the Trump accounts of such employees or dependents of such employees which meets requirements similar to the requirements of paragraphs (2), (3), (6), (7), and (8) of section 129(d).
